'''ngachubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cracovian|cracovian]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ch-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cracovian|cracovian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngachubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæchibith|ngæchibith]] || [[word:ngæchibij|ngæchibij]] || [[word:ngæchibish|ngæchibish]] || [[word:ngæchibi|ngæchibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngachuchubuth|ngachuchubuth]] || [[word:ngachuchubuj|ngachuchubuj]] || [[word:ngachuchubush|ngachuchubush]] || [[word:ngachuchubu|ngachuchubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngachubuth|ngachubuth]] || [[word:ngachubuj|ngachubuj]] || [[word:ngachubush|ngachubush]] || [[word:ngachubu|ngachubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngachufbuth|ngachufbuth]] || [[word:ngachufbuj|ngachufbuj]] || [[word:ngachufbush|ngachufbush]] || [[word:ngachufbuf|ngachufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngachubuthu|ngachubuthu]] || [[word:ngachubuju|ngachubuju]] || [[word:ngachubushu|ngachubushu]] || [[word:ngachubuku|ngachubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngachubuth|ngachubuth]] || [[word:ngachubuj|ngachubuj]] || [[word:ngachubush|ngachubush]] || [[word:ngachubu|ngachubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngachubuthul|ngachubuthul]] || [[word:ngachubujul|ngachubujul]] || [[word:ngachubushul|ngachubushul]] || [[word:ngachubukul|ngachubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngachubuthuthu|ngachubuthuthu]] || [[word:ngachubujuju|ngachubujuju]] || [[word:ngachubushushu|ngachubushushu]] || [[word:ngachubuku|ngachubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngachubuthun|ngachubuthun]] || [[word:ngachubujun|ngachubujun]] || [[word:ngachubushun|ngachubushun]] || [[word:ngachubukun|ngachubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngachubuthuoro|ngachubuthuoro]] || [[word:ngachubujuoro|ngachubujuoro]] || [[word:ngachubushuoro|ngachubushuoro]] || [[word:ngachubukuoro|ngachubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
